title: Clairefontaine - Ref 201342C - Christmas Alliance Long Roll Wrapping Paper (Single Roll) - 70cm Width x 50m Length, 60gsm Paper - Red Baubles on White Design
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: PATTERNS: A reel of gift wrap with patterns: Red Christmas Balls, Scandinavian Balls, Christmas. A large format roll, ideal for packaging professionals.
DIMENSIONS: 50m x 0.70m – Alliance paper, Weight: 60g. A 50m reel is the ideal length to wrap your gifts all year round. Also meets the needs of professionals.

ALL OCCASIONS: A gift wrap suitable for all occasions: your birthday parties, wedding parties, Mother's/Father's Day or the end of the year celebrations. Experience the pleasure of giving with our packaging rolls.
SUPERIOR QUALITY: Clairefontaine paper is of high quality. The Alliance range guarantees you the best quality/price ratio.
MADE IN FRANCE: Clairefontaine paper is made in France in our factory located in the Auvergne Rhône Alpes region.

CLAIREFONTAINE Rhodia is the gift wrapping specialist: our quality products meet your needs and requirements! Our wide range of gift packaging will allow you to enhance your most beautiful gifts throughout the year.
description: From the manufacturer Clairefontaine Stationery, Art & Crafts for School, Office & Home Paper production is a long tradition for the Meurthe Valley, since the creation of the first paper mills in the 16th century. It is in this convenient environment that Papeteries de Clairefontaine began production in 1858. Taking advantage of the rags supplied by the local textile industry, Clairefontaine will become one of the most important factories in the region in a few years. To complete its offer, the company will begin manufacturing envelopes in 1880 and then follow those of laptops. Self-taught artist, Isabelle Bouteillet has been an art gallery director for many years. She has developed a technique of illustrative and abstract collages. Clairefontaine wanted to bring her characters to life by showing them in notebooks and accessories, combining the sobriety of her role with the delicacy of her creations. Essentially characters! Colorful, tender, full of spirit, to which the techniques used pay homage: gouache, pastel, acrylic, colored pencil. Clairefontaine offers several formats and weights for its Fine Arts paper sheets. Pads or packages, even in roll. For wet and dry drawing techniques. granulated paper, granulated color paper, plain drawing paper, technical drawing paper, bristol paper, white vellum graph paper, tracing paper, washing drawing, gouache and acrylic paper, pastel colored groins, calligraphy, white blotting paper, black scraped cardboard paper. The Pollen range was born on a beautiful summer day in 1997. Initially composed of 10 A4 paper colors 120g and 2 envelope sizes. It has developed over the years to better respond to the expectations of all audiences: individuals and professionals. With the success achieved by Clairefontaine Pollen offers today: 45 fashion colors: bright, pastel and iridescent 1128 document references, correspondence cards, ad cards, envelopes. Composed of fashion printed papers, creative notebooks, kits and timeless papers essential for manual activities, the Clairefontaine "Creative Leisure" range will delight children and adults alike. Rich in color and texture, it meets the creative needs as well as Clairefontaine's requirements in terms of quality, expertise and environmental commitments. Clairefontaine is a specialist in stationery for office, school and crafts. The Clairefontaine factory has been manufacturing paper since 1858 and stationery products since 1890. In 1950, Clairefontaine began offering high-quality notebooks for schoolchildren. Now famous for its premium notebooks, Clairefontaine inspires quality through its products: staple notebook, wired notebook, journal, address book, music book, textbook, school journal, office accessories, boxes, paper bags, gift paper. Clairefontaine … the name has become a symbol of quality in the world and has always been able to create products that are perfectly in tune with the needs of students and teachers. The stationery collection made from recycled jeans and cocoa shells! Create a beautiful floral composition on crepe paper with this creative kit! Sticky back notebook. Detachable micro-perforated sheets. Paint'ON 250g: 250gsm natural bulky paper suitable for acrylic paint, gouache, ink, dry or oil cakes, collages and dry techniques. Clairefontaine correspondence: Forever and Triumph. Clairefontaine's know-how for premium gift papers, handbags and gift accessories.
